---
id: close-period
title: "Close an accounting period"
description: "Closes the specified YYYY-MM period. Fails if the period is already closed or if any DRAFT entries remain."
sidebar_label: "Close an accounting period"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Close an accounting period"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/journals/period-close"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Closes the specified YYYY-MM period. Fails if the period is already closed or if any DRAFT entries remain.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
